subparts.text: Define time complexity and space complexity. Provide an example. 2.5
Explain the Master Theorem and give an example. 2.5
Differentiate between Divide and Conquer and Dynamic Programming. 2.5
What is a Greedy algorithm? Give an example. 2.5
State and explain the properties of NP-complete problems. 2.5
Write the algorithm for the BFS traversal of a graph. 2.5
Explain the significance of Huffman coding in data compression. 2.5
Describe the role of finite automata in string matching. 2.5

questions.question_text: Solve the recurrence relation T = T + n using the iterative method.
Explain the working of Quick Sort with an example. Derive its best, worst, and average case complexities.
Solve the 0/1 Knapsack problem using the Greedy approach. Show stepwise execution.
Explain the Matrix Chain Multiplication problem and solve it using Dynamic Programming.
Describe Dijkstra’s algorithm for finding the shortest path with the help of suitable example.
Explain the working of the n-Queens problem using Backtracking.
Explain the working of the Rabin-Karp algorithm with an example.
What are NP-Complete problems? Prove that the Subset Sum problem is NP-Complete.
